description_long: This is a sleek, futuristic airplane with a sharply pointed nose and a narrow, elongated fuselage. The wings are swept back and mounted low on the body, each featuring prominent wingtip extensions and what appear to be weapon pods or sensor arrays. The tail section is distinctive, with a single vertical stabilizer and a pair of horizontal stabilizers set low and wide. The cockpit is positioned near the front of the fuselage and appears to be enclosed, with a streamlined canopy integrated into the body. The exterior is finished in a matte black color, giving the airplane a stealthy, high-tech appearance.
description: A sleek, matte black, futuristic airplane with swept low wings, a pointed nose, and a single vertical tail fin.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, low-mounted swept wings with wingtip extensions, and the central cockpit canopy.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated fuselage, low wing placement, and the single vertical stabilizer at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the wide horizontal stabilizers, single vertical tail fin, and the symmetry of the wingtip extensions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the same elongated body, low wings, and rear stabilizer configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with swept wings and prominent wingtip extensions; no visible dihedral or anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single rear-mounted jet engine integrated into the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear with two main units and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a streamlined canopy, likely single-seat.
